channel.title: MindExtract
channel.description: MindExtract — download and transcribe video from anywhere

item.title: Version 1.5.3
item.description:
What's New in 1.5.3

  • Fixed word spacing in transcriptions — Words are now properly separated with spaces and paragraph breaks between segments
  • Fixed transcription window not reopening — Closing via the red X button no longer prevents the window from opening on next transcription
  • History transcriptions reopen reliably — Clicking a transcription in history always opens the transcription window
  • Better exported transcription files — Plain text exports now include timestamps and paragraph formatting
  • Improved readability — Increased font sizes across the app for better legibility
